acceptedAnswer.text: UM claim viable, but AI self-blame cuts value—fix with proof.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes via UM if policy has; purge AI influence.[1] Arizona fault-based; AI admissions reduce payout.

**Key factors:**
- UM/UIM coverage check.
- Self-blame weakens.
- No-fault no.

File UM claim fast; evidence overrides AI. Lawyer maximizes.[1] Check policy limits.
